Florida.title: Florida Real Estate #floridarealestateagents ...
Florida.script:
Hey so if you're thinking about buying in Florida right now I need you to hear this first 🌴

The market is shifting and most buyers are completely missing it. Interest rates are doing something weird and sellers in certain pockets are literally dropping prices faster than we've seen in years.

Like some of these deals would have been impossible 18 months ago.

I've been watching zip codes that nobody is talking about yet and the opportunity is honestly kind of insane right now for the right buyer.

Florida is still growing like crazy. People are moving here every single day. Inventory is up but not everywhere and that gap is where the smart money is going right now.

So here's what I need to know from you... are you looking to buy in Florida in the next 6 months and what's your biggest question about the market?

Florida.author: agentjasonj
Florida.title: Single women own more homes than single men‼️ 🗣️ ...
Florida.script:
Did you know single women own 2.7 million MORE homes than single men right now? 11.1 million vs 8.4 million. That gap is WILD.

Ladies, you are literally building generational wealth while some guys are out here spending thousands on chains and cars that lose value the second you drive off the lot.

I see this every single day selling homes in Tampa and around Florida. My single female buyers come in focused, prepared, and ready to BUILD. And honestly? It inspires me every time.

Fellas I love you but we have to do better. Your landlord has been getting rich off YOU long enough.

Whether you are single, married, divorced, whatever your situation is, homeownership is the move in 2024. I will walk you through the entire process step by step and map out exactly what YOUR path to ownership looks like.

So real talk, what is actually stopping you from buying your first home right now?

Florida.caption:
A fail is just a new opportunity to learn from your mistakes💪

What would you do??🤔

🏷️
#realtor #realestate #florida #realestateagent #capecoral
Florida.author: jamesboyer
Florida.title: A fail is just a new opportunity to learn from your mistakes💪 ...
Florida.script:
Lost $15k on a deal in Naples and here is what actually happened.

Seller randomly terminated. Found out the next day she went under contract with MY buyer. Cut me out completely. And get this... she was a licensed realtor in New York. She knew EXACTLY what she was doing.

I was heated. Wanted to go scorched earth on her.

But instead I did something that made me way more money long term. I sat down, reviewed every single contract I had, tightened everything up, and built systems so no seller could EVER do that to me again.

That one painful loss turned into my strongest protection going forward.

The agents who eat in this market are not the ones who avoid failure. They are the ones who learn faster than everyone else.

What is the biggest deal lesson YOU learned the hard way?

Florida.caption:
$0 to buy a home?

Yes, in most cases, buyers don’t pay their real estate agent out of pocket.

If you’re buying a home in South Florida, understanding how this works can save you money and help you avoid going into a deal unrepresented.

You have someone negotiating, guiding, and protecting you… without writing a check directly to them.

Thinking about buying? Let’s talk.

📲954-326-8873
💌giannasellsfl@gmail.com

*Commissions aren’t set and can vary by transaction

#southfloridarealestate #browardcountyhomes #coralspringsrealtor #miamihomebuyers #floridarealestate
Florida.author: giannasellsfl
Florida.title: South Florida REALTOR®☀️🌴 | $0 to buy a home? Yes, in ...
Florida.script:
Wait wait wait. You think you have to PAY your realtor out of pocket as a buyer? That's literally the biggest myth stopping people from buying homes right now.

Hey I'm Gianna, South Florida Realtor specializing in first time buyers, and I need you to hear this.

In most cases your agent's commission is already baked into the deal and paid by the SELLER at closing. That's zero dollars out of your pocket for someone in your corner fighting for you every single step.

And trust me you NEED someone fighting for you. Without a buyer's agent you're walking into the seller's territory completely unprotected. That's like showing up to court without a lawyer.

My job is to negotiate hard, catch the red flags you'd never see, and get you the best deal possible.

So real talk, what's actually been stopping you from buying your first home in South Florida?

Florida.caption:
March saw nearly $21M in real estate transactions… and somehow, we still made time to slow down (just a little). ✨

Between putting 3 properties under contract, multiple inspections, and celebrating closings, it was a full month across the board.

And when it was time to reset… we headed to our usual spring break escape in Ocala to visit my horse, Max. 🐎
�A true breath of fresh air.

From swimming at Devil’s Den to visiting an elephant sanctuary (and learning just how close they are to extinction)… these are the moments that put everything back into perspective.

And of course, my favorite role of all…dance mom. 💫�Watching my daughter take 3rd place in her first solo competition made this month even more special.

Grateful for it all.
Excited for what April has in store…

 Kim Rodstein | Selling South Florida since 1998 ✨�📲305-776-8646

�
#MiamiRealEstate #LuxuryRealEstate #MiamiRealtor #SouthFloridaLiving
Florida.author: kimrodstein
Florida.title: March saw nearly $21M in real estate transactions… and ...
Florida.script:
March was WILD. Nearly $21 million in real estate transactions, 3 properties under contract, inspections, closings… the works.

But here's what nobody talks about… the best agents protect their energy so they can protect yours.

So we hit Ocala. My horse Max, Devil's Den, an elephant sanctuary… and watching my daughter place 3rd in her first solo competition. I cried. Obviously.

Here's the thing. I've been selling South Florida since 1998. The market moves fast and it does NOT wait. But the agents who stay grounded? We catch things the burned out ones miss. Negotiation details. Inspection red flags. Timing opportunities that save you thousands.

April is already heating up and inventory is moving faster than most buyers expect.

So tell me… are you planning to buy or sell in South Florida this year and haven't made a move yet?

USA.author: momslittlestar
USA.title: Yes… we moved 🏡✨ This video is actually from the very ...
USA.script:
We moved. And honestly? Best decision we ever made.

I remember standing in that empty living room thinking "what if we waited too long" but here we are and the market actually worked IN our favor.

Here is what nobody tells you about moving in this market. Timing feels scary but waiting costs you more. Every month you hesitate is another month of someone else building equity in YOUR dream home.

We went from "maybe someday" to keys in hand in 47 days flat.

The process was smoother than we expected. The neighborhood exceeded everything on our list. And that kitchen... yeah the kitchen sealed the deal instantly.

Your move does not have to feel overwhelming either. It just takes one conversation to figure out what is actually possible for you right now.

So tell me... what is the ONE thing stopping you from making your move this year?

USA.caption:
REALTORS….. how do you pass the time ?

#openhouses #billingsrealestate #realestate
USA.author: billieinbtown
USA.title: REALTORS….. how do you pass the time ? #openhouses ...
USA.script:
Okay real talk... open houses hit different when you actually LOVE what you do.

While other agents are scrolling their phones and counting ceiling tiles... I'm studying every person who walks through that door.

Body language. Questions they ask. What they linger on.

Because here is the thing. Most buyers cannot even tell you what they want. But I can SEE it before they can say it.

That is not luck. That is reps. Hundreds of open houses. Thousands of conversations.

Some agents treat open houses like a waiting game. I treat every single one like a masterclass in human behavior.

And THAT is why my clients find their perfect home faster than average. No guessing. No wasted weekends. Just results.

So tell me... when you walked through your last open house, did your agent actually pay attention to YOU or were they just babysitting the door?

USA.author: vgm.realestate
USA.title: BTS as a realtor! Everyday is different so some days I'll ...
USA.script: Hey guys, Hartfield here giving you a real BTS look at what a realtor's day actually looks like. Just wrapped filming a 4 bed 2 bath home tour in Torrance and I'm already racing to my next listing less than 5 minutes away. After this I've got two more stops in Long Beach and San Pedro. No breaks, no slow mornings, just back to back action for my clients. And honestly? I would not trade it for anything. Between the house tours, the emails, the texts, the coffee shop laptop sessions... every single day is different and that is what makes this job incredible. I work this hard because buying or selling a home is probably the biggest move of your life and you deserve someone who goes all in. So real talk... are you currently looking to buy or sell in the South Bay or Long Beach area?

USA.author: aruba_the_txrealtor
USA.title: Another home tour in Floresville 🏡✨ This beautiful ...
USA.script: Hey so this Floresville home just hit the market and I need you to see this before someone else scoops it up. Four beds, three and a half baths, three car garage, sitting on a full acre. The covered front porch alone made me stop and just breathe for a second. Inside you got a dedicated home office, a cozy fireplace, and this kitchen that honestly looks like it belongs in a magazine. Quartz island, five burner gas range, built in oven, coffee bar situation. The primary suite is completely separated from the other bedrooms which parents absolutely love. Double vanity, soaking tub, walk in shower, his and her closets. This is the kind of home people wait years to find in this price range and homes like this in Floresville are not sitting long right now. So real talk, what feature here would make you pack your bags fastest?

USA.author: lucretia_ramsey
USA.title: Tour of New Loganville Home 580k 5 Bedroom. ...
USA.script:
5 bedrooms. 4 bathrooms. Starting in the 580s. And right now they are offering rates as low as 4.99% depending on your situation.

This Loganville community is hitting every single box. Top rated schools. Amazing location. New construction. And this kitchen... oversized island, quartz countertops, tons of cabinet space, a sunroom AND an entertaining bar. I need you to see this in person.

The primary suite upstairs with that garden tub is giving luxury for real. And if you need space for guests there is a whole extra flex area waiting for you.

Listen. New construction at this price point with incentives this good does not stick around. Loganville is growing FAST and buyers are already moving.

I am Lucretia Ramsey and I will personally walk you through this home or any Metro Atlanta community you are eyeing.

Drop this question below: what is stopping you from making your move to Atlanta this year?
